reason: A lunar monolith probe ignites first contact’s intellectual and awe-filled dialogue.
An astronomer intercepts alien signals with rigorous science and tense wonder.
A ship’s AI droid and a freed queen challenge humanity’s understanding of extraterrestrials.
A reporter documents pioneering SETI work with reverent seriousness and suspense.
A washed-up radio host deciphers alien code with scientific rigor and wonder.
An eccentric general’s lieutenants grapple with off-world intelligence errors.
A conscripted writer chases a pioneering communication breakthrough in icy isolation.
An epic desert quest uncovers an artefact signaling profound cosmic insight.
An FBI agent studies alien hybrid science to decode interspecies signals.
A war-torn scientist’s transmission from Hell reveals dark communication mysteries.
